summary.zh: 让展开或缩放从触发点发生，保持动作来源的空间连续性。
summary.en: Expand or scale from the trigger point to preserve spatial continuity.

definition.zh: 元素从触发它的控件位置展开，例如弹出层从打开它的按钮处生长，而非沿用 CSS 默认的自身中心。
definition.en: Entrance geometry begins at the control or location that triggered the new surface, preserving their spatial relationship.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素相对最终尺寸的起始比例。
description.en: Controls the starting size relative to the final state.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 让弹出层或展开内容从触发控件处生长，保持动作来源可追踪。
purpose.en: Grow overlays or expanded content from their trigger so the motion source remains traceable.

frequency.zh: 适合中频菜单、气泡和局部展开；全屏页面切换使用更稳定的空间规则。
frequency.en: Use for medium-frequency menus, popovers, and local expansion; full-screen transitions need a more stable spatial rule.

trigger.zh: 由具体触发控件打开内容时触发，并根据触发点与浮层位置计算原点。
trigger.en: Trigger when a specific control opens content, deriving origin from trigger and overlay placement.

enterExit.zh: 进入从触发点缩放并淡入；离开回到同一触发点，随后恢复焦点。
enterExit.en: Scale and fade in from the trigger; exit toward the same point and then restore focus.

interruptibility.zh: 浮层位置变化时平滑更新原点，关闭动作从当前几何状态开始。
interruptibility.en: Update origin smoothly if placement changes, and begin closing from current geometry.

gestureRules.zh: 无需拖拽；触发控件必须支持键盘打开、Escape 关闭和正确焦点管理。
gestureRules.en: No drag is required; the trigger supports keyboard opening, Escape closing, and correct focus management.

reducedMotion.zh: 保持触发点与浮层的静态位置关联，使用短淡入淡出替代缩放位移。
reducedMotion.en: Preserve the static trigger-overlay relationship and replace scaling travel with a short fade.

reviewNotes.zh: 在四个边缘位置测试原点计算。
reviewNotes.en: Test origin calculation at all four viewport edges.

reviewNotes.zh: 确认滚动或重排后关闭路径仍指向当前触发控件。
reviewNotes.en: Ensure the closing path still points to the current trigger after scroll or reflow.
